upstream_projects.name: SDL2
upstream_projects.purpose: Desktop host runtime path for rendering, audio, and input.

upstream_projects.name: GBDK-2020
upstream_projects.purpose: Game Boy toolchain and API surface used by the GB target.

upstream_projects.name: devkitARM / libgba
upstream_projects.purpose: Game Boy Advance toolchain and API surface used by the GBA target.

module_groups.name: graphical_host_optional
module_groups.purpose: Optional graphical host and joystick fallback support.

notes: Tkinter remains the baseline host path.
pygame is only used when the graphical host enables joystick fallback helpers.
Track broader open-source attribution in THIRD_PARTY_CREDITS.md and tools/dependency_manifests/open_source_3d_stack.json.
